risk: A Telegram bot credential and destination are exposed to every visitor; secret values are intentionally excluded from this package.
required_action: Rotate the credential and move submission to a server-side endpoint with environment-managed secrets
approval_gate: Explicit approval required before credential rotation or production configuration changes

risk: Visitor name/email/message data is sent directly from the browser to a third-party endpoint without a server-side validation and abuse-control boundary.
required_action: Implement consent disclosure server-side validation rate limiting error handling and privacy controls
approval_gate: Production behavior change requires separate validation and approval

risk: Homepage has HSTS but lacks CSP X-Content-Type-Options X-Frame-Options Referrer-Policy and Permissions-Policy.
required_action: Design CSP in report-only mode first then validate and enforce compatible security headers
approval_gate: Deploy headers atomically with the validated release

risk: The directly addressable 404 document returns HTTP 200 and may be indexed as a soft 404.
required_action: Keep unmatched routes returning HTTP 404 and prevent the standalone error document from becoming an indexable content URL
approval_gate: SEO approval required before routing changes

risk: A test/partial page is publicly reachable with missing SEO controls.
required_action: Preserve content until owner decision then apply approved indexability treatment without deleting the URL
approval_gate: Explicit approval required before noindex redirect or content treatment
